title: Mobile Trashcan
description: This mod adds Mobile Trashcan which automatically removes selected items from the inventory.
body:
This mod adds Mobile Trashcan which automatically removes selected items from the inventory.

 

Trashcan will automatically remove items from your inventory that you put into the filter.

 

 

 Trashcan Recipe

 

I agree to use this mod in a public modpack, but it must be on this website or on the curseforge website.
